title: A and B and Lecture Rooms

content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "A and B and Lecture Rooms". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/519/problem/E
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n, the number of lecture rooms. Then n lines follow, each containing two integers ai and bi, the start and end times of a lecture.
content.outputFormat: The minimum number of rooms required.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Sort the lectures by start time and use a priority queue to keep track of the end times of the lectures.

code.Python3:
import sys
import heapq
n = int(sys.stdin.readline())
lectures = [list(map(int, sys.stdin.readline().split())) for _ in range(n)]
lectures.sort(key=lambda x: x[0])
end_times = []
max_rooms = 0
for start, end in lectures:
    if end_times and end_times[0] <= start:
        heapq.heappop(end_times)
    heapq.heappush(end_times, end)
    max_rooms = max(max_rooms, len(end_times))
print(max_rooms)
